analytics.title: Orbit Intelligence Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Realtime AI-powered workspace intelligence, predictive productivity monitoring and autonomous business analysis.
analytics.productivityAcceleration: Productivity acceleration detected across workspace systems.
analytics.productivityDescription: Orbit AI identified increased workflow efficiency, CRM engagement growth and elevated automation execution performance.
analytics.realtimeIntelligence: Realtime operational intelligence across workspace systems.
analytics.insight1Description: Orbit AI identified elevated execution efficiency across active workspace systems.
analytics.insight2Description: Lead engagement performance improved during the last automation cycle.
analytics.insight3Description: Orbit AI suggests automating repetitive workspace operations.
analytics.predictiveSubtitle: Autonomous AI prediction systems monitoring workspace behavior, productivity risks and future operational performance.
analytics.prediction1Description: Orbit AI predicts reduced execution efficiency within the next operational cycle.
analytics.prediction2Description: Lead engagement momentum indicates elevated conversion potential.
analytics.prediction3Description: AI identified high-priority task congestion inside automation queues.
analytics.autonomousSubtitle: AI-generated execution flows, intelligent recovery systems and autonomous operational assistance.

analytics.plan2Description: Orbit AI identified elevated engagement potential inside the CRM pipeline.
analytics.previewBannerDescription: These metrics display example data. Real analytics will reflect your actual workspace activity once integrated.
